assertions.reason: The frontend now reads and mutates application state through dedicated Zustand stores, and App.jsx is reduced to 372 lines.
evidence: wc -l src/App.jsx reported 372 lines, below the <400 requirement.
src/stores/newsStore.js, src/stores/filterStore.js, and src/stores/uiStore.js exist and expose state/actions used by App.jsx.
src/App.jsx imports useNewsStore, useFilterStore, and useUIStore at lines 14-16 and consumes store actions throughout the component.
